_comment: Fully autonomous post+reply+repost decision-maker (src/triggers/ai_manager.py). One Claude call decides whether to post something original, which candidate replies (if any) to send, AND which candidates (if any) to repost (plain retweet or quote-tweet with its own comment) -- given a full data snapshot, see README's 'AI Manager' section. min_hours_between_calls plus max_calls_per_day bound it to roughly 5-10 calls/day even though the workflow itself runs hourly.
